notes: This manifest intentionally has no year filter; it replays all cached official matches, currently the 2024-2026 cache.
It compares residual-ridge against the earlier event-type residual and archetype candidates in one candidate set instead of comparing separate reports.
All candidates are no-future/promotable; published Statbotics predictions are deliberately omitted from this promotion manifest because prediction timestamp provenance is not established.
